entry.note: <L>13748<pc>80,1<k1>am<k2>am<h>3<e>1 <hom>3.</hom> <s>am</s> ¦ <s>amati</s>, to go, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to go to or towards, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to serve or honour, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to sound, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="vp"/> (<ab>Imper.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> 2. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>amIzva</s>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>AmIt</s>; <ab>cf.</ab> <s>aBy-√ am</s>) <div n="to"/>to fix, render firm, <ls>TS.</ls>; <div n="to"/> (<ab>perf.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> <ab>acc.</ab> <ab>sg.</ab> <s>emuza/m</s> for <s>emivA/Msam</s>) to be pernicious or dangerous, <ls>RV. viii, 77, 10</ls> : <div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>Ama/yati</s> (<ab>impf.</ab> <s>A/mayat</s>; <ab>aor.</ab> <ab>Subj.</ab> <s>Amamat</s>) <div n="to"/>to be afflicted or sick, <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV.</ls>; <ls>VS.</ls> (<ab>cf.</ab> <s>a/n-Amayat</s>). <info whitneyroots="am,3"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="0Ā"/> <LEND>

<L>5034<pc>1-0366<k1>am<k2>am<h>2 2. {#am#}¦, {#a/mati#} (ved. {#amiti, amIti#} <ls>P. 7,2,34.</ls> <ls n="P. 7,">3,95.</ls>) {%gehen; einen Laut%} [Page1-0367] {%von sich geben; ehren%} <ls>DHĀTUP. 13,22.</ls> part. perf. {#emivaMs#} {%schädlich, verderblich%}, acc. {#emuza/m#} (der abw. Acc. beruht wohl auf Missverständniss der Form) <ls>ṚV. 8,66,10</ls> : {#va\rA\ham#}; vgl. <ls>NIR. 5,4.</ls> und {#emUza#} . part. perf. pass. {#Anta#} oder {#amita#} <ls>P. 7,2,28.</ls> <ls>VOP. 26,113.</ls> — Caus. {#Ama/yati#} <ls>DHĀTUP. 19,69.</ls> <ls>VOP. 18,22.</ls> <div n="1"> 1) {%befallen, beschädigen%}: {#mA ca^ na\H kiM ca\nAma^mat#} <ls>AV. 6,37,3.</ls> <ls n="AV.">10,5,23.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) {%schadhaft, krank sein%} <ls>DHĀTUP. 33,46.</ls> {#yasyA^ u\dara\mAma^yat#} <ls>ṚV. 10,86,33.</ls> {#mo ca^ na\H kiM ca\nAma^mat#} <ls>VS. 16,47.</ls> {#mUtra^M BavatvA\maya^t#} <ls>AV. 9,8,10.</ls> <div n="v">— Vgl. 2. {#ama#}, 1. {#amata#}, <ls n="AV. 9,8,">3.</ls> {#amati#}, <ls n="AV. 9,8,">1.</ls> {#amatra, amasa#} . <div n="p">— {#aBi#} {%mit Gewalt gegen Jmd vorschreiten, plagen%}: {#kiM SU^rapatni na\stvama\Bya^mIzi vf\zAka^pim#} <ls>ṚV. 10,86,8.</ls> {#tama\Bya^mIti\#} (vgl. <ls>P. 7,2,34.</ls> <ls n="P. 7,">3,95</ls>, <ls>Sch.</ls>) {#varu^RaH#} <ls>VS. 22,5.</ls> {#ni du\rga i^ndra SnaTihya\mitrA^na\Bi ye no\ martA^so a\manti^#} <ls>ṚV. 7,25,2.</ls> med. dass.: {#agne\ tvama\smadyu^yo\DyamI^vA\ ana^gnitrA a\Byama^nta kf\zwIH#} <ls>ṚV. 1,189,3.</ls> part. {#aByamita#} {%gefürchtet%} <ls>NIR. 6,23.</ls> {#aByamita#} oder {#aByAnta#} {% ... [truncated]

<L>8059<pc>1-094-b<k1>am<k2>am<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> √{#am#}¦, *{#amati#}, *{#amiti#} ({#gatyAdizu, gatO Sabde samBaktO#}) und {#amIti#} {%festmachen, festsetzen%}. — {#emuza/m#} <ab>Acc.</ab> das <ab>Partic.</ab> <ab>perf.</ab> {%schädlich, verderblich%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#Ama/yati#} {%Schaden leiden, schadhaft —, krank sein%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} <ab>Act.</ab> und <ab>Med.</ab> {%gegen Jmd%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%andringen, plagen%}. *{#aByamita#} und *{#aByAnta#} {%krank%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pari#} {%bedrängen, plagen%} <ls>KĀṬH. 13,1</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit *{#vi#} <ab>Partic.</ab> <lang>ved.</lang> {#vyemAna#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} <ab>Med.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%Sich Jmd verbinden%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%sich verbünden%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%unter sich festsetzen%}. <LEND>
